Cut the FiberWire suture tails with an open-ended FiberWire cutter. 7 6 8 9 | Knotless Corkscrew® PASTA Bridge Repair 06 Ordering Information Implants Product Description Item Number Biocomposite, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew® anchor, w/ #5 suture AR-1941BC PEEK, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew anchor, w/ #5 suture AR-1941PSV Biocomposite, SwiveLock® C, 4.75 mm × 19.1 mm, closed eyelet AR-2324BCC PASTA Bridge Repair Kit Product Description Item Number Drill Guide and Dilator, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941DG Fishmouth Drill Guide, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941DGF Circumferential Teeth Drill Guide, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941CT Drill, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941D Punch, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941P Punch Tap, 3.9 mm Knotless Corkscrew AR-1941PTB Optional Instruments Product Description Item Number Percutaneous Insertion Kit for 3.0 mm Knotless SutureTak® Anchor AR-1938PK Drill Guide and Dilator AR-1941DG Punch Tap AR-1941PTB Punch AR-1941P Drill AR-1941D Knotless Corkscrew® PASTA Bridge Repair | 07 Knotless 2.6 FiberTak® Suture Anchor The Knotless 2.6 FiberTak soft suture anchor has the same tensionable knotless technology as the smaller Knotless 1.8 FiberTak soft suture anchor with a #5 repair suture. This anchor option combines the benefits of a soft anchor with a broader soft-tissue repair option. Using a drill guide and 2.6 mm drill, create a pilot hole and insert the anchor through the drill guide. Once the repair suture is passed through tissue, shuttle it into the knotless suture mechanism. Suture repair tension can be controlled and adjusted under direct visualization. Additional Benefits: ■ #5 repair suture provides a broader compression for soft-tissue repairs ■ A tapered suture tail designed for suture passing with a Scorpion™ suture passer Applications: ■ Partial articular supraspinatus tendon avulsion (PASTA) ■ Upper boarder subscapularis tear ■ Hill-Sachs lesion Ordering Information Implant Product Description Item Number Knotless 2.6 FiberTak Suture Anchor, w/ #5 suture AR-3641 Disposable Instruments Product Description Item Number Disposables Kit, w/ spear, obturator, and 2.6 mm drill AR-3650DS 2.6 mm Drill AR-3657 Reusable Instruments Product Description Item Number Punch, Knotless 2.6 FiberTak AR-3656 Blunt-Tip Obturator for Spear AR-3658B Trocar-Tip Obturator for Spear AR-3658T Angled Spear w/ Circumferential Teeth AR-3655 Spear w/ Circumferential Teeth (From 3.5 mm PushLock® Anchor System) AR-1906 Fishmouth Spear (From 3.5 mm PushLock Anchor System) AR-1907 Blunt-Tip Obturator AR-3658B Trocar-Tip Obturator AR-3658T Angled Spear w/ Circumferential Teeth AR-3655 Spear w/ Circumferential Teeth AR-1906 Fishmouth Spear AR-1907 This surgical technique has been developed in cooperation with Alan M.
